topic: 面向VLA模型的持续时序场景空间对齐方法
topic_en: Persistent Temporal Scene-Spatial Alignment for VLA Models
topic_brief: Move VLA grounding from single-frame region-level alignment to temporally-consistent scene-level entity tracking; use that consistency to detect and correct execution-time errors in long-horizon, multi-stage, dynamic manipulation.

ideation.key_finding: Gap: persistent scene-entity rep used as VLA grounding + consistency residual as intrinsic error signal — combination not yet covered.

coding.smoke_status: pending_gpu_env (torch not installed locally — gate per blueprint §9 to be run on GPU box)

smoke_findings.synthetic_e2e: OpenVLA+PSSA stub on synthetic obs: 188ms/step, 15.45GB VRAM
smoke_findings.libero_e2e: OpenVLA generalist on libero_spatial:0, 5x200 steps, 0/5 SR (expected: no LIBERO finetune), 190ms/step stable, no crash, no EGL leak
smoke_findings.version_pins: transformers==4.45.2, timm==0.9.16, tokenizers==0.20.3, robosuite==1.4.0, bddl==1.0.1, mujoco==3.1.6
network_workarounds: git config insteadOf https://gh-proxy.com/https://github.com/ (GitHub clone throttled)
smoke_findings.system_pkgs_required: apt install libegl1 libgl1 (libglvnd dispatcher; AutoDL image lacks it by default)
smoke_findings.libero_packaging_fix: touch /root/autodl-tmp/LIBERO/libero/__init__.py (missing in clone, find_packages broken without it)

execution.remaining: scale to mid budget (1500-2200 RMB / 8-10 A100-days); no compute-side blockers; next: download openvla-7b-finetuned-libero-spatial for real numbers

figure_gen.scope: framework figure only; quantitative figures blocked on EXECUTION

writing.todo_markers: Experiments §5.2-5.5 + abstract numbers; tied to EXECUTION

notes: User-provided motivation: existing VLA models only do per-frame visual grounding; proposed method introduces cross-time-consistent scene entity representation to track objects + spatial relations, enabling long-horizon stability and execution-time error correction via consistency.
